content.text: Due to the nature of wholesale transactions, returns are accepted only under the following conditions:

content.subtitle: Damaged or Defective Products
content.text: Goods received in a physically damaged or non-functional condition.

content.subtitle: Incorrect Items Received
content.text: Product specifications (model, size, quantity, or variant) do not match the confirmed purchase order.

content.subtitle: Manufacturing Defect
content.text: A production-level fault is present, substantiated by clear photographic or video evidence.
Returns will NOT be accepted for buyer's remorse, unsold or slow-moving inventory, or minor cosmetic packaging damage that does not affect the product's functionality or usability.
To initiate a return or replacement request, follow these steps within 48 hours of delivery:

content.label: A.
content.text: Contact our support team at info@mdigimart.com or call +91 96522 83222 within 48 hours of receiving the shipment.

items: Clear photographs or video evidence of the issue

content.label: C.
content.text: Our team will review your request and communicate approval or rejection within 2–3 business days.
No returns will be processed without prior written authorisation from mdigimart. Requests submitted after the 48-hour window will not be entertained.

items: If the return is approved due to our error (wrong, defective, or damaged goods dispatched), mdigimart will arrange a pickup or fully reimburse verified return shipping costs.
If a return is requested for reasons other than our error and is accepted through mutual agreement, all return logistics costs will be borne by the buyer.

content.text: Once returned goods are received, inspected, and verified by our quality team:

items: Refunds, where applicable, will be processed within 7–10 business days to the original payment method or as store credit, at mdigimart's discretion.
Replacements will be dispatched subject to stock availability. Lead times will be communicated at the time of approval.
Wholesale orders cannot be cancelled once they have been processed, packed, or dispatched.
For prepaid, custom-branded, or bulk manufacturing orders, advance payments are strictly non-refundable once production has commenced.

content.text: The following categories are not eligible for returns or refunds under any circumstances:
